topics.topic_en: June 3 Local Elections Final Campaign Push
topics.summary: South Korea's 9th nationwide local elections are set for June 3, with the Democratic Party of Korea leading polls in key battlegrounds including Seoul (41% vs PPP's 37%) and Busan (47% vs 34%). DPK frames the vote as a continuation of 'purging insurrection remnants,' while PPP deployed former presidents Lee Myung-bak and Park Geun-hye for last-minute conservative rallies in Busan and Daegu.

evidence_headlines.title: 여야, 6·3 지선 사흘 앞두고 서울.전북 등 집중
[MBC여론조사] '서울·대구' 접전‥부산 전재수 오차 범위 밖 우세
지방선거인데 대통령만 보인다… 선거판 삼킨 '이재명 프레임'

topics.topic_en: Yoon Insurrection Trial Appeals and New Verdicts
topics.topic_ko: 윤석열 내란 항소심 지연 및 추가 재판
topics.summary: Yoon Seok-yeol's insurrection appeal (항소심) remains stalled after his legal team's repeated judicial recusal filings and re-appeals, while eight parallel trials continue; the special prosecutor on June 1 sought seven years imprisonment for former Secret Service chief Park Jong-jun for obstructing Yoon's arrest, with a verdict expected July 9.

evidence_headlines.title: [2보] 내란 특검, '尹 체포 저지' 박종준 전 경호처장 징역 7년 구형
내란 '무기징역'·위증 '무죄' 받은 윤석열 8개 재판 중간점검
윤석열·김용현, 내란 재판부 기피 또 불복…항소심 또 멈추나

topics.topic_en: Han Dong-hoon Independent Run and PPP Internal Rift
topics.summary: Former PPP leader Han Dong-hoon is running as an independent in the Busan Buk-gap by-election after being expelled from the PPP, polling at 43% against the DPK's 37% and the PPP's own candidate at 20%. The contest has exposed deep divisions between the pro-Yoon PPP leadership and the Han faction, with some PPP-aligned figures covertly supporting Han.

evidence_headlines.title: [MBC여론조사] 부산 북갑에서 경기 평택을에서 한동훈·조국 '잠룡' 존재감
[2026전국동시지방선거]-한동훈에 현역 기초단체장까지...'무소속' 변수
국민의힘은 수도권 지역구 거물급 차출 무위…한동훈 내분 시달려

topics.topic_en: Progressive Camp Split in Pyeongtaek By-election
topics.summary: The Pyeongtaek-eul by-election has turned acrimonious between the DPK and the Cho Guk Innovation Party after progressive unification talks collapsed; Cho Guk leads at 29% with DPK's Kim Yong-nam at 26%, and the parties have exchanged sharp personal attacks, raising fears of a vote split that could hand the seat to the PPP's Yoo Eui-dong.

evidence_headlines.title: 평택을 재선거 막판 야권 공방…조국혁신당, 민주당 지도부 비판
"그래도 여당" "조국 살려야" "토박이 유의동"‥평택을 민심 들어보니
범죄자·시한폭탄 말까지…민주-조국혁신당 극한 공방

topics.topic_en: KOSPI Record Highs and Semiconductor Boom
topics.summary: KOSPI broke successive all-time records, surpassing 8,200 points driven by a global semiconductor super-cycle and investor optimism around Nvidia's Jensen Huang, with the Lee government and DPK using the market rally as a campaign talking point; analysts warn of concentration risk in chip stocks amid a K-shaped economic divergence.

evidence_headlines.title: "메모리 랠리 더 간다" 코스피 또 최고치인데‥10개 중 9개 종목은 하락했다
'확장 재정·반도체의 힘'… 2% 성장·2% 물가·2300억弗 흑자 [이재명 정부 1년 성과]
반도체 낙관에 젠슨 황 기대감‥"9천피 보인다"

topics.topic_en: Lee Jae-myung Approval Rating Slight Decline
topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung's approval rating dipped to 61% (Gallup, late May), down 3 percentage points from a recent high of 67%, though it remains historically elevated; the DPK holds 45% party support versus the PPP's 23%, with the gap narrowing slightly as the local elections approach.

evidence_headlines.title: 이재명 대통령 지지율 61%, 민주당 45%·국민의힘 23%
이재명 대통령 지지율 67%…민주당 2%p↓·국민의힘 3%p↑
이 대통령 지지율 65.5% 취임 후 최고‥민주당 50.5%·국힘 31.4%

topics.topic_en: Ex-Presidents Park and Lee Campaign for PPP
topics.summary: Former presidents Park Geun-hye and Lee Myung-bak campaigned in Daegu and Busan respectively on June 1 to rally conservative voters for PPP candidates, a rare joint intervention that the DPK characterized as a 'revival attempt by conservative forces.' Some voices within the conservative camp, including Hong Joon-pyo, warned the move could backfire by alienating centrist voters.

evidence_headlines.title: '격전지' 영남권 보수 재결집 나선 '이명박근혜'
김부겸 측 "박근혜 등판, 선거 판세에 영향 없을 것"
[AI 지선 판세 분석] 민주당, 우세 6·경합우세 6 vs 국힘, 우세 1·경합우세 1

topics.topic_en: Korea Navy Commands RIMPAC for First Time in Asia
topics.topic_ko: 한국 해군 RIMPAC 아시아 최초 연합사령관 수행
topics.summary: South Korea's Navy departed for Hawaii on June 1 with Rear Admiral Kim In-ho set to serve as the first Asian national to command the Combined Force Maritime Component Commander role at RIMPAC 2026, involving 31 nations; the milestone is being framed domestically as proof of Korea's growing Indo-Pacific defense role under the Lee government.

evidence_headlines.title: "참가국에서 지휘국으로"…한국 해군, 림팩서 아시아 첫 연합해군 지휘
韓, 2026 림팩 연합해군 지휘권 잡는다…인태지역 역할 확대 해석
정조대왕함, 오늘 제주 출항…해군, 림팩 참가·연합사령관도 첫 수행

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
